query: SELECT 'leads_restantes' as tipo, COUNT(*) as total FROM leads UNION ALL SELECT 'users_restantes', COUNT(*) FROM users UNION ALL SELECT 'leads_teste_restantes', COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE nome LIKE 'Lead %' OR nome LIKE 'Test%' OR nome LIKE 'Teste%' UNION ALL SELECT 'corretores_teste_restantes', COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Corretor%Teste%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Rank%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Batch%' OR name = 'Corretor 2' OR name LIKE 'João Silva Teste';
